meaning: n.大厅 起居室 接待室
examples: There will be large tracts of snow in the Sala my palms.
Junpei is making up a bedtime story for Sala, Sayoko's little daughter.
Junpei thinks it over, and eventually decides to marry Sayoko, after an evening spent telling stories to Sala.
Ambos maestros aparecieron en la sala de conferencias donde les preguntamos por los detalles de su partida.
Martinez sits center stage, and to his right is Jhair Sala, who plays the cowbell and the bongos.
